title: Representation of data
summary: 9709 S1 — histograms, cumulative frequency, mean, median, and spread for grouped data with GeoGebra.
learningObjectives: Construct and interpret histograms with unequal class widths.
Calculate mean and estimate median from grouped data.
Draw and use cumulative frequency curves.
Compare distributions using centre and spread measures.

simpleExplanation.title: Describing data sets
simpleExplanation.summary: Grouped data uses class midpoints for estimates. Frequency density = frequency ÷ class width for histograms.
steps: Histogram: area ∝ frequency — use frequency density on y-axis.
Mean ≈ Σfx / Σf with x = class midpoint.
Median: n/2 on cumulative frequency graph.
IQR = Q₃ − Q₁ from quartile positions.

sections.content: **Representation of data** (5.1) opens Statistics 1. Watch **class boundaries** vs **widths** — histogram errors are common.
